summary: Strong second set highlighted by a perfect "Saint of Circumstance" and lively Spanish jam, captured on a good‑quality soundboard recording.
review: Fans rave about the second set – especially the flawless "Saint of Circumstance" and an inspired Spanish‑style jam – while the first set is seen as uneven but still solid. The soundboard source delivers clear detail and overall good balance, making the show enjoyable despite a few mixed opinions on pacing.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the performance (especially the second set) and note excellent to good recording quality; one strong negative review drags the average down, yielding a solid but not outstanding overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Several reviewers call the detail crisp and the mix clear; no major drop‑outs or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set viewed as average with a few highlights; second set described as spectacular and tightly played, giving the concert its lasting appeal.
